title: Arthrosamanea eriorhachis
taxonomy: Arthrosamanea eriorhachis is classified under the family Fabaceae, which is a large and diverse group of flowering plants commonly known as legumes. This family is further divided into various subfamilies, and Arthrosamanea eriorhachis falls under the subfamily Faboideae. The genus Arthrosamanea is a relatively small group of plants, and Arthrosamanea eriorhachis is one of its species. The classification of this plant is based on its morphology, anatomy, and molecular characteristics. Further research is needed to confirm its exact classification and position within the plant kingdom.
